basics.name: Vatsal Trivedi
basics.label: Agentic AI Engineer | Full Spectrum Developer | Integration Specialist | UI/UX Enthusiast
basics.summary: I build intelligent systems at the intersection of generative AI and enterprise software. My work centers on architecting agentic workflows, LLM orchestration pipelines, and RAG powered applications that solve real problems in pharma and martech. Over the years I have worked across the full stack and what keeps me engaged is the combination of systems thinking, deep integration challenges, and crafting products that people genuinely enjoy using. I pay close attention to the design layer just as much as the architecture, and I am always finding ways to make AI feel less like infrastructure and more like a natural collaborator inside the products I help build.

work.name: Phamax
work.description: Ariya — AI platform for pharma that streamlines content generation, information research, analytics, and engagement.
work.summary: Leading engineering for Ariya, an AI-powered platform transforming pharmaceutical content workflows, research, analytics, and engagement. Driving the design and delivery of scalable, compliant, and intelligent systems integrating generative AI with enterprise ecosystems.
highlights: Architecting core systems for Ariya, an AI platform enabling end-to-end pharmaceutical workflows across content creation, research, analytics, and engagement.
Built the AI Content Wizard and end-to-end content lifecycle management system covering authoring, approval workflows, compliance validation, and omnichannel distribution.
Developed advanced LLM orchestration frameworks including prompt engineering, context injection, and retrieval-based augmentation (RAG) for high-quality, compliant content generation.
Integrated Ariya with enterprise ecosystems including Veeva CRM, Salesforce Marketing Cloud (SFMC), and external data platforms for seamless data and engagement workflows.
Led development of a centralized Data Catalog enabling metadata-driven discovery and self-serve data access across business and engineering teams.
Implemented scalable, governed architecture with auditability, traceability, and optimized AI/data pipelines using caching and vector databases for performance and cost efficiency.

work.name: Comviva
work.description: MobiLytix™ Rewards & MobiLytix™ Digital Marketing Product
work.summary: MobiLytix™ Rewards is a next-generation engagement marketing solution designed to power loyalty programs and promotional campaigns across industries.
highlights: Leading the modernization of the MR platform into a cloud-agnostic SaaS product with AI/ML integration.
Driving architecture and feature development using TypeScript, React, FeatherJS, Delta Lake, Postgres, and vector databases.
Delivering major improvements in scalability, performance, and user engagement through data-driven personalization.

work.name: Comviva
work.summary: Contributed to the development of an omni-channel marketing automation platform designed to help enterprises engage customers across digital touchpoints.
highlights: Delivered 14+ integrations including Shopify Public App, Seatgeek, HubSpot, AWS QuickSight, GoodData, Matomo, WooCommerce, WordPress, Batch Push, and Unlayer Editor.
Implemented ML-driven insights using Google BigQuery and GoodData for personalized campaign optimization.
Enhanced performance through query optimization, caching, and CDN strategies.
Addressed complex integration challenges related to scalability, data security, and performance optimization.

work.name: Tata Consultancy Services (TCS)
work.description: Worked in the Lifesciences domain, delivering digital transformation solutions for global clients.
highlights: Developed and delivered full-stack applications using ReactJS, Angular, NodeJS, and ExpressJS.
Enabled business collaboration using Microsoft 365 suite including SharePoint, Teams, Power Automate, and Power BI.
Implemented GA360-based analytics solutions using Google Analytics, Tag Manager, and Data Studio.
Contributed to scalable, data-driven decision-making through end-to-end digital solutions.

volunteer.summary: Lead the design team for the GDG Ahmedabad chapter, creating event visuals, branding assets, and social media graphics for community events.
Mentored open-source contributors during the GirlScript Summer of Code 2020 program, guiding them in project architecture, code reviews, and development best practices.

education.institution: Birla Vishvakarma Mahavidyalaya Engineering College, Vallabh Vidyanagar
